title: Canto 8 Chapter 13
summary: Complete English Bhagavatam chapter generated from the public gita/Datasets repository. Each route exposes one shloka at a time.
sourceNote: This chapter includes devanagari text, roman transliteration, English translation, and purport when available in the upstream corpus.

verses.text: श्रीशुक उवाचमनुर्विवस्वत: पुत्र: श्राद्धदेव इति श्रुत: ।सप्तमो वर्तमानो यस्तदपत्यानि मे श‍ृणु ॥ १ ॥
verses.transliteration: śrī-śuka uvācamanur vivasvataḥ putraḥśrāddhadeva iti śrutaḥsaptamo vartamāno yastad-apatyāni me śṛṇu
verses.meaning: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: The present Manu, who is named Śrāddhadeva, is the son of Vivasvān, the predominating deity on the sun planet. Śrāddhadeva is the seventh Manu. Now please hear from me as I describe his sons.
verses.wordMeanings: śrī; śukaḥ; uvāca; manuḥ; vivasvataḥ; putraḥ; śrāddhadevaḥ; iti; śrutaḥ; saptamaḥ; vartamānaḥ; yaḥ; tat; apatyāni; me; śṛṇu

verses.text: इक्ष्वाकुर्नभगश्चैव धृष्ट: शर्यातिरेव च ।नरिष्यन्तोऽथ नाभाग: सप्तमो दिष्ट उच्यते ॥ २ ॥तरूषश्च पृषध्रश्च दशमो वसुमान्स्मृत: ।मनोर्वैवस्वतस्यैते दशपुत्रा: परन्तप ॥ ३ ॥
verses.transliteration: ikṣvākur nabhagaś caivadhṛṣṭaḥ śaryātir eva canariṣyanto ’tha nābhāgaḥsaptamo diṣṭa ucyate
verses.meaning: O King Parīkṣit, among the ten sons of Manu are Ikṣvāku, Nabhaga, Dhṛṣṭa, Śaryāti, Nariṣyanta and Nābhāga. The seventh son is known as Diṣṭa. Then come Tarūṣa and Pṛṣadhra, and the tenth son is known as Vasumān.
verses.wordMeanings: ikṣvākuḥ; nabhagaḥ; ca; eva; dhṛṣṭaḥ; śaryātiḥ; eva; ca; nariṣyantaḥ; atha; nābhāgaḥ; saptamaḥ; diṣṭaḥ; ucyate; tarūṣaḥ; ca; pṛṣadhraḥ; ca; daśamaḥ; vasumān; smṛtaḥ; manoḥ; vaivasvatasya; ete; daśa; putrāḥ; parantapa

verses.text: आदित्या वसवो रुद्रा विश्वेदेवा मरुद्गणा: ।अश्विनावृभवो राजन्निन्द्रस्तेषां पुरन्दर: ॥ ४ ॥
verses.transliteration: ādityā vasavo rudrāviśvedevā marud-gaṇāḥaśvināv ṛbhavo rājannindras teṣāṁ purandaraḥ
verses.meaning: In this manvantara, O King, the Ādityas, the Vasus, the Rudras, the Viśvedevas, the Maruts, the two Aśvinī-kumāra brothers and the Ṛbhus are the demigods. Their head king [Indra] is Purandara.
verses.wordMeanings: ādityāḥ; vasavaḥ; rudrāḥ; viśvedevāḥ; marut; gaṇāḥ; aśvinau; ṛbhavaḥ; rājan; indraḥ; teṣām; purandaraḥ

verses.text: कश्यपोऽत्रिर्वसिष्ठश्च विश्वामित्रोऽथ गौतम: ।जमदग्निर्भरद्वाज इति सप्तर्षय: स्मृता: ॥ ५ ॥
verses.transliteration: kaśyapo ’trir vasiṣṭhaś caviśvāmitro ’tha gautamaḥjamadagnir bharadvājaiti saptarṣayaḥ smṛtāḥ
verses.meaning: Kaśyapa, Atri, Vasiṣṭha, Viśvāmitra, Gautama, Jamadagni and Bharadvāja are known as the seven sages.
verses.wordMeanings: kaśyapaḥ; atriḥ; vasiṣṭhaḥ; ca; viśvāmitraḥ; atha; gautamaḥ; jamadagniḥ; bharadvājaḥ; iti; sapta; ṛṣayaḥ; smṛtāḥ

verses.text: अत्रापि भगवज्जन्म कश्यपाददितेरभूत् ।आदित्यानामवरजो विष्णुर्वामनरूपधृक् ॥ ६ ॥
verses.transliteration: atrāpi bhagavaj-janmakaśyapād aditer abhūtādityānām avarajoviṣṇur vāmana-rūpa-dhṛk
verses.meaning: In this manvantara, the Supreme Personality of Godhead appeared as the youngest of all the Ādityas, known as Vāmana, the dwarf. His father was Kaśyapa and His mother Aditi.
verses.wordMeanings: atra; api; bhagavat; janma; kaśyapāt; aditeḥ; abhūt; ādityānām; avara; jaḥ; viṣṇuḥ; vāmana; rūpa; dhṛk

verses.text: सङ्‌क्षेपतो मयोक्तानि सप्तमन्वन्तराणि ते ।भविष्याण्यथ वक्ष्यामि विष्णो: शक्त्यान्वितानि च ॥ ७ ॥
verses.transliteration: saṅkṣepato mayoktānisapta-manvantarāṇi tebhaviṣyāṇy atha vakṣyāmiviṣṇoḥ śaktyānvitāni ca
verses.meaning: I have briefly explained to you the position of the seven Manus. Now I shall describe the future Manus, along with the incarnations of Lord Viṣṇu.
verses.wordMeanings: saṅkṣepataḥ; mayā; uktāni; sapta; manu; antarāṇi; te; bhaviṣyāṇi; atha; vakṣyāmi; viṣṇoḥ; śaktyā; anvitāni; ca

verses.text: विवस्वतश्च द्वे जाये विश्वकर्मसुते उभे ।संज्ञा छाया च राजेन्द्र ये प्रागभिहिते तव ॥ ८ ॥
verses.transliteration: vivasvataś ca dve jāyeviśvakarma-sute ubhesaṁjñā chāyā ca rājendraye prāg abhihite tava
verses.meaning: O King, I have previously described [in the Sixth Canto] the two daughters of Viśvakarmā, named Saṁjñā and Chāyā, who were the first two wives of Vivasvān.
verses.wordMeanings: vivasvataḥ; ca; dve; jāye; viśvakarma; sute; ubhe; saṁjñā; chāyā; ca; rāja; indra; ye; prāk; abhihite; tava

verses.text: तृतीयां वडवामेके तासां संज्ञासुतास्त्रय: ।यमो यमी श्राद्धदेवश्छायायाश्च सुताञ्छृणु ॥ ९ ॥
verses.transliteration: tṛtīyāṁ vaḍavām eketāsāṁ saṁjñā-sutās trayaḥyamo yamī śrāddhadevaśchāyāyāś ca sutāñ chṛṇu
verses.meaning: It is said that the sun-god had a third wife, named Vaḍavā. Of the three wives, the wife named Saṁjñā had three children — Yama, Yamī and Śrāddhadeva. Now let me describe the children of Chāyā.
verses.wordMeanings: tṛtīyām; vaḍavām; eke; tāsām; saṁjñā; sutāḥ; trayaḥ; yamaḥ; yamī; śrāddhadevaḥ; chāyāyāḥ; ca; sutān; śṛṇu

verses.text: सावर्णिस्तपती कन्या भार्या संवरणस्य या ।शनैश्चरस्तृतीयोऽभूदश्विनौ वडवात्मजौ ॥ १० ॥
verses.transliteration: sāvarṇis tapatī kanyābhāryā saṁvaraṇasya yāśanaiścaras tṛtīyo ’bhūdaśvinau vaḍavātmajau
verses.meaning: Chāyā had a son named Sāvarṇi and a daughter named Tapatī, who later became the wife of King Saṁvaraṇa. Chāyā’s third child is known as Śanaiścara [Saturn]. Vaḍavā gave birth to two sons, namely the Aśvinī brothers.
verses.wordMeanings: sāvarṇiḥ; tapatī; kanyā; bhāryā; saṁvaraṇasya; yā; śanaiścaraḥ; tṛtīyaḥ; abhūt; aśvinau; vaḍavā; ātma; jau

verses.text: अष्टमेऽन्तर आयाते सावर्णिर्भविता मनु: ।निर्मोकविरजस्काद्या: सावर्णितनया नृप ॥ ११ ॥
verses.transliteration: aṣṭame ’ntara āyātesāvarṇir bhavitā manuḥnirmoka-virajaskādyāḥsāvarṇi-tanayā nṛpa
verses.meaning: O King, when the period of the eighth Manu arrives, Sāvarṇi will become the Manu. Nirmoka and Virajaska will be among his sons.
verses.wordMeanings: aṣṭame; antare; āyāte; sāvarṇiḥ; bhavitā; manuḥ; nirmoka; virajaska; ādyāḥ; sāvarṇi; tanayāḥ; nṛpa
verses.purport: The present reign is that of Vaivasvata Manu. According to astronomical calculations, we are now in the twenty-eighth yuga of Vaivasvata Manu. Each Manu lives for seventy-one yugas, and fourteen such Manus rule in one day of Lord Brahmā. We are now in the period of Vaivasvata Manu, the seventh Manu, and the eighth Manu will come into existence after many millions of years. But Śukadeva Gosvāmī, having heard from authorities, foretells that the eighth Manu will be Sāvarṇi and that Nirmoka and Virajaska will be among his sons. Śāstra can foretell what will happen millions and millions of years in the future.

verses.text: तत्र देवा: सुतपसो विरजा अमृतप्रभा: ।तेषां विरोचनसुतो बलिरिन्द्रो भविष्यति ॥ १२ ॥
verses.transliteration: tatra devāḥ sutapasovirajā amṛtaprabhāḥteṣāṁ virocana-sutobalir indro bhaviṣyati
verses.meaning: In the period of the eighth Manu, among the demigods will be the Sutapās, the Virajas and the Amṛtaprabhas. The king of the demigods, Indra, will be Bali Mahārāja, the son of Virocana.
verses.wordMeanings: tatra; devāḥ; sutapasaḥ; virajāḥ; amṛtaprabhāḥ; teṣām; virocana; sutaḥ; baliḥ; indraḥ; bhaviṣyati

verses.text: दत्त्वेमां याचमानाय विष्णवे य: पदत्रयम् ।राद्धमिन्द्रपदं हित्वा तत: सिद्धिमवाप्स्यति ॥ १३ ॥
verses.transliteration: dattvemāṁ yācamānāyaviṣṇave yaḥ pada-trayamrāddham indra-padaṁ hitvātataḥ siddhim avāpsyati
verses.meaning: Bali Mahārāja gave a gift of three paces of land to Lord Viṣṇu, and because of this charity he lost all the three worlds. Later, however, when Lord Viṣṇu is pleased because of Bali’s giving everything to Him, Bali Mahārāja will achieve the perfection of life.
verses.wordMeanings: dattvā; imām; yācamānāya; viṣṇave; yaḥ; pada; trayam; rāddham; indra; padam; hitvā; tataḥ; siddhim; avāpsyati
verses.purport: In Bhagavad-gītā (7.3) it is stated, manuṣyāṇāṁ sahasreṣu kaścid yatati siddhaye: out of many millions of people, one may attempt to achieve success in life. This success is explained here. Rāddham indra-padaṁ hitvā tataḥ siddhim avāpsyati. Siddhi consists of achieving the favor of Lord Viṣṇu, not the yoga-siddhis. The yoga-siddhis — aṇimā, laghimā, mahimā, prāpti, prākāmya, īśitva, vaśitva and kāmāvasāyitā — are temporary. The ultimate siddhi is to achieve the favor of Lord Viṣṇu.

verses.text: योऽसौ भगवता बद्ध: प्रीतेन सुतले पुन: ।निवेशितोऽधिके स्वर्गादधुनास्ते स्वराडिव ॥ १४ ॥
verses.transliteration: yo ’sau bhagavatā baddhaḥprītena sutale punaḥniveśito ’dhike svargādadhunāste sva-rāḍ iva
verses.meaning: With great affection, the Personality of Godhead bound Bali and then installed him in the kingdom of Sutala, which is more opulent than the heavenly planets. Mahārāja Bali now resides on that planet and is more comfortably situated than Indra.
verses.wordMeanings: yaḥ; asau; bhagavatā; baddhaḥ; prītena; sutale; punaḥ; niveśitaḥ; adhike; svargāt; adhunā; āste; sva; rāṭ; iva

verses.text: गालवो दीप्तिमान्‌रामो द्रोणपुत्र: कृपस्तथा ।ऋष्यश‍ृङ्ग: पितास्माकं भगवान्बादरायण: ॥ १५ ॥इमे सप्तर्षयस्तत्र भविष्यन्ति स्वयोगत: ।इदानीमासते राजन् स्वे स्व आश्रममण्डले ॥ १६ ॥
verses.transliteration: gālavo dīptimān rāmodroṇa-putraḥ kṛpas tathāṛṣyaśṛṅgaḥ pitāsmākaṁbhagavān bādarāyaṇaḥ
verses.meaning: O King, during the eighth manvantara, the great personalities Gālava, Dīptimān, Paraśurāma, Aśvatthāmā, Kṛpācārya, Ṛṣyaśṛṅga and our father, Vyāsadeva, the incarnation of Nārāyaṇa, will be the seven sages. For the present, they are all residing in their respective āśramas.
verses.wordMeanings: gālavaḥ; dīptimān; rāmaḥ; droṇa; putraḥ; kṛpaḥ; tathā; ṛṣyaśṛṅgaḥ; pitā; asmākam; bhagavān; bādarāyaṇaḥ; ime; sapta; ṛṣayaḥ; tatra; bhaviṣyanti; sva; yogataḥ; idānīm; āsate; rājan; sve; sve; āśrama; maṇḍale

verses.text: देवगुह्यात्सरस्वत्यां सार्वभौम इति प्रभु: ।स्थानं पुरन्दराद्‌धृत्वा बलये दास्यतीश्वर: ॥ १७ ॥
verses.transliteration: devaguhyāt sarasvatyāṁsārvabhauma iti prabhuḥsthānaṁ purandarād dhṛtvābalaye dāsyatīśvaraḥ
verses.meaning: In the eighth manvantara, the greatly powerful Personality of Godhead Sārvabhauma will take birth. His father will be Devaguhya, and His mother will be Sarasvatī. He will take the kingdom away from Purandara [Lord Indra] and give it to Bali Mahārāja.
verses.wordMeanings: devaguhyāt; sarasvatyām; sārvabhaumaḥ; iti; prabhuḥ; sthānam; purandarāt; hṛtvā; balaye; dāsyati; īśvaraḥ

verses.text: नवमो दक्षसावर्णिर्मनुर्वरुणसम्भव: ।भूतकेतुर्दीप्तकेतुरित्याद्यास्तत्सुता नृप ॥ १८ ॥
verses.transliteration: navamo dakṣa-sāvarṇirmanur varuṇa-sambhavaḥbhūtaketur dīptaketurity ādyās tat-sutā nṛpa
verses.meaning: O King, the ninth Manu will be Dakṣa-sāvarṇi, who is born of Varuṇa. Among his sons will be Bhūtaketu, and Dīptaketu.
verses.wordMeanings: navamaḥ; dakṣa; sāvarṇiḥ; manuḥ; varuṇa; sambhavaḥ; bhūtaketuḥ; dīptaketuḥ; iti; ādyāḥ; tat; sutāḥ; nṛpa

verses.text: पारामरीचिगर्भाद्या देवा इन्द्रोऽद्भ‍ुत: स्मृत: ।द्युतिमत्प्रमुखास्तत्र भविष्यन्त्यृषयस्तत: ॥ १९ ॥
verses.transliteration: pārā-marīcigarbhādyādevā indro ’dbhutaḥ smṛtaḥdyutimat-pramukhās tatrabhaviṣyanty ṛṣayas tataḥ
verses.meaning: In this ninth manvantara, the Pāras and Marīcigarbhas will be among the demigods. The king of heaven, Indra, will be named Adbhuta, and Dyutimān will be among the seven sages.
verses.wordMeanings: pārā; marīcigarbha; ādyāḥ; devāḥ; indraḥ; adbhutaḥ; smṛtaḥ; dyutimat; pramukhāḥ; tatra; bhaviṣyanti; ṛṣayaḥ; tataḥ

verses.text: आयुष्मतोऽम्बुधारायामृषभो भगवत्कला ।भविता येन संराद्धां त्रिलोकीं भोक्ष्यतेऽद्भ‍ुत: ॥ २० ॥
verses.transliteration: āyuṣmato ’mbudhārāyāmṛṣabho bhagavat-kalābhavitā yena saṁrāddhāṁtri-lokīṁ bhokṣyate ’dbhutaḥ
verses.meaning: Ṛṣabhadeva, a partial incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, will take birth from his father, Āyuṣmān, and his mother, Ambudhārā. He will enable the Indra named Adbhuta to enjoy the opulence of the three worlds.
verses.wordMeanings: āyuṣmataḥ; ambudhārāyām; ṛṣabhaḥ; bhagavat; kalā; bhavitā; yena; saṁrāddhām; tri; lokīm; bhokṣyate; adbhutaḥ

verses.text: दशमो ब्रह्मसावर्णिरुपश्लोकसुतो मनु: ।तत्सुता भूरिषेणाद्या हविष्मत्प्रमुखा द्विजा: ॥ २१ ॥
verses.transliteration: daśamo brahma-sāvarṇirupaśloka-suto manuḥtat-sutā bhūriṣeṇādyāhaviṣmat pramukhā dvijāḥ
verses.meaning: The son of Upaśloka known as Brahma-sāvarṇi will be the tenth Manu. Bhūriṣeṇa will be among his sons, and the brāhmaṇas headed by Haviṣmān will be the seven sages.
verses.wordMeanings: daśamaḥ; brahma; sāvarṇiḥ; upaśloka; sutaḥ; manuḥ; tat; sutāḥ; bhūriṣeṇa; ādyāḥ; haviṣmat; pramukhāḥ; dvijāḥ

verses.text: हविष्मान्सुकृत: सत्यो जयो मूर्तिस्तदा द्विजा: ।सुवासनविरुद्धाद्या देवा: शम्भु: सुरेश्वर: ॥ २२ ॥
verses.transliteration: haviṣmān sukṛtaḥ satyojayo mūrtis tadā dvijāḥsuvāsana-viruddhādyādevāḥ śambhuḥ sureśvaraḥ
verses.meaning: Haviṣmān, Sukṛta, Satya, Jaya, Mūrti and others will be the seven sages, the Suvāsanas and Viruddhas will be among the demigods, and Śambhu will be their king, Indra.
verses.wordMeanings: haviṣmān; sukṛtaḥ; satyaḥ; jayaḥ; mūrtiḥ; tadā; dvijāḥ; suvāsana; viruddha; ādyāḥ; devāḥ; śambhuḥ; sura; īśvaraḥ

verses.text: विष्वक्सेनो विषूच्यां तु शम्भो: सख्यं करिष्यति ।जात: स्वांशेन भगवान्गृहे विश्वसृजो विभु: ॥ २३ ॥
verses.transliteration: viṣvakseno viṣūcyāṁ tuśambhoḥ sakhyaṁ kariṣyatijātaḥ svāṁśena bhagavāngṛhe viśvasṛjo vibhuḥ
verses.meaning: In the home of Viśvasraṣṭā, a plenary portion of the Supreme Personality of Godhead will appear from the womb of Viṣūcī as the incarnation known as Viṣvaksena. He will make friends with Śambhu.
verses.wordMeanings: viṣvaksenaḥ; viṣūcyām; tu; śambhoḥ; sakhyam; kariṣyati; jātaḥ; sva; aṁśena; bhagavān; gṛhe; viśvasṛjaḥ; vibhuḥ

verses.text: मनुर्वै धर्मसावर्णिरेकादशम आत्मवान् ।अनागतास्तत्सुताश्च सत्यधर्मादयो दश ॥ २४ ॥
verses.transliteration: manur vai dharma-sāvarṇirekādaśama ātmavānanāgatās tat-sutāś casatyadharmādayo daśa
verses.meaning: In the eleventh manvantara, the Manu will be Dharma-sāvarṇi, who will be extremely learned in spiritual knowledge. From him there will come ten sons, headed by Satyadharma.
verses.wordMeanings: manuḥ; vai; dharma; sāvarṇiḥ; ekādaśamaḥ; ātmavān; anāgatāḥ; tat; sutāḥ; ca; satyadharma; ādayaḥ; daśa

verses.text: विहङ्गमा: कामगमा निर्वाणरुचय: सुरा: ।इन्द्रश्च वैधृतस्तेषामृषयश्चारुणादय: ॥ २५ ॥
verses.transliteration: vihaṅgamāḥ kāmagamānirvāṇarucayaḥ surāḥindraś ca vaidhṛtas teṣāmṛṣayaś cāruṇādayaḥ
verses.meaning: The Vihaṅgamas, Kāmagamas, Nirvāṇarucis and others will be the demigods. The king of the demigods, Indra, will be Vaidhṛta, and the seven sages will be headed by Aruṇa.
verses.wordMeanings: vihaṅgamāḥ; kāmagamāḥ; nirvāṇarucayaḥ; surāḥ; indraḥ; ca; vaidhṛtaḥ; teṣām; ṛṣayaḥ; ca; aruṇa; ādayaḥ

verses.text: आर्यकस्य सुतस्तत्र धर्मसेतुरिति स्मृत: ।वैधृतायां हरेरंशस्त्रिलोकीं धारयिष्यति ॥ २६ ॥
verses.transliteration: āryakasya sutas tatradharmasetur iti smṛtaḥvaidhṛtāyāṁ harer aṁśastri-lokīṁ dhārayiṣyati
verses.meaning: The son of Āryaka known as Dharmasetu, a partial incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, will appear from the womb of Vaidhṛtā, the wife of Āryaka, and will rule the three worlds.
verses.wordMeanings: āryakasya; sutaḥ; tatra; dharmasetuḥ; iti; smṛtaḥ; vaidhṛtāyām; hareḥ; aṁśaḥ; tri; lokīm; dhārayiṣyati

verses.text: भविता रुद्रसावर्णी राजन्द्वादशमो मनु: ।देववानुपदेवश्च देवश्रेष्ठादय: सुता: ॥ २७ ॥
verses.transliteration: bhavitā rudra-sāvarṇīrājan dvādaśamo manuḥdevavān upadevaś cadevaśreṣṭhādayaḥ sutāḥ
verses.meaning: O King, the twelfth Manu will be named Rudra-sāvarṇi. Devavān, Upadeva and Devaśreṣṭha will be among his sons.
verses.wordMeanings: bhavitā; rudra; sāvarṇiḥ; rājan; dvādaśamaḥ; manuḥ; devavān; upadevaḥ; ca; devaśreṣṭha; ādayaḥ; sutāḥ

verses.text: ऋतधामा च तत्रेन्द्रो देवाश्च हरितादय: ।ऋषयश्च तपोमूर्तिस्तपस्व्याग्नीध्रकादय: ॥ २८ ॥
verses.transliteration: ṛtadhāmā ca tatrendrodevāś ca haritādayaḥṛṣayaś ca tapomūrtistapasvy āgnīdhrakādayaḥ
verses.meaning: In this manvantara, the name of Indra will be Ṛtadhāmā, and the demigods will be headed by the Haritas. Among the sages will be Tapomūrti, Tapasvī and Āgnīdhraka.
verses.wordMeanings: ṛtadhāmā; ca; tatra; indraḥ; devāḥ; ca; harita; ādayaḥ; ṛṣayaḥ; ca; tapomūrtiḥ; tapasvī; āgnīdhraka; ādayaḥ

verses.text: स्वधामाख्यो हरेरंश: साधयिष्यति तन्मनो: ।अन्तरं सत्यसहस: सुनृताया: सुतो विभु: ॥ २९ ॥
verses.transliteration: svadhāmākhyo harer aṁśaḥsādhayiṣyati tan-manoḥantaraṁ satyasahasaḥsunṛtāyāḥ suto vibhuḥ
verses.meaning: From the mother named Sunṛtā and the father named Satyasahā will come Svadhāmā, a partial incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead. He will rule that manvantara.
verses.wordMeanings: svadhāmā; ākhyaḥ; hareḥ; aṁśaḥ; sādhayiṣyati; tat; manoḥ; antaram; satyasahasaḥ; sunṛtāyāḥ; sutaḥ; vibhuḥ

verses.text: मनुस्त्रयोदशो भाव्यो देवसावर्णिरात्मवान् ।चित्रसेनविचित्राद्या देवसावर्णिदेहजा: ॥ ३० ॥
verses.transliteration: manus trayodaśo bhāvyodeva-sāvarṇir ātmavāncitrasena-vicitrādyādeva-sāvarṇi-dehajāḥ
verses.meaning: The thirteenth Manu will be named Deva-sāvarṇi, and he will be very advanced in spiritual knowledge. Among his sons will be Citrasena and Vicitra.
verses.wordMeanings: manuḥ; trayodaśaḥ; bhāvyaḥ; deva; sāvarṇiḥ; ātmavān; citrasena; vicitra; ādyāḥ; deva; sāvarṇi; deha; jāḥ

verses.text: देवा: सुकर्मसुत्रामसंज्ञा इन्द्रो दिवस्पति: ।निर्मोकतत्त्वदर्शाद्या भविष्यन्त्यृषयस्तदा ॥ ३१ ॥
verses.transliteration: devāḥ sukarma-sutrāma-saṁjñā indro divaspatiḥnirmoka-tattvadarśādyābhaviṣyanty ṛṣayas tadā
verses.meaning: In the thirteenth manvantara, the Sukarmās and Sutrāmas will be among the demigods, Divaspati will be the king of heaven, and Nirmoka and Tattvadarśa will be among the seven sages.
verses.wordMeanings: devāḥ; sukarma; sutrāma; saṁjñāḥ; indraḥ; divaspatiḥ; nirmoka; tattvadarśa; ādyāḥ; bhaviṣyanti; ṛṣayaḥ; tadā

verses.text: देवहोत्रस्य तनय उपहर्ता दिवस्पते: ।योगेश्वरो हरेरंशो बृहत्यां सम्भविष्यति ॥ ३२ ॥
verses.transliteration: devahotrasya tanayaupahartā divaspateḥyogeśvaro harer aṁśobṛhatyāṁ sambhaviṣyati
verses.meaning: The son of Devahotra known as Yogeśvara will appear as a partial incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead. His mother’s name will be Bṛhatī. He will perform activities for the welfare of Divaspati.
verses.wordMeanings: devahotrasya; tanayaḥ; upahartā; divaspateḥ; yoga; īśvaraḥ; hareḥ; aṁśaḥ; bṛhatyām; sambhaviṣyati

verses.text: मनुर्वा इन्द्रसावर्णिश्चतुर्दशम एष्यति ।उरुगम्भीरबुधाद्या इन्द्रसावर्णिवीर्यजा: ॥ ३३ ॥
verses.transliteration: manur vā indra-sāvarṇiścaturdaśama eṣyatiuru-gambhīra-budhādyāindra-sāvarṇi-vīryajāḥ
verses.meaning: The name of the fourteenth Manu will be Indra-sāvarṇi. He will have sons like Uru, Gambhīra and Budha.
verses.wordMeanings: manuḥ; vā; indra; sāvarṇiḥ; caturdaśamaḥ; eṣyati; uru; gambhīra; budha; ādyāḥ; indra; sāvarṇi; vīrya; jāḥ

verses.text: पवित्राश्चाक्षुषा देवा: शुचिरिन्द्रो भविष्यति ।अग्निर्बाहु: शुचि: शुद्धो मागधाद्यास्तपस्विन: ॥ ३४ ॥
verses.transliteration: pavitrāś cākṣuṣā devāḥśucir indro bhaviṣyatiagnir bāhuḥ śuciḥ śuddhomāgadhādyās tapasvinaḥ
verses.meaning: The Pavitras and Cākṣuṣas will be among the demigods, and Śuci will be Indra, the king of heaven. Agni, Bāhu, Śuci, Śuddha, Māgadha and others of great austerity will be the seven sages.
verses.wordMeanings: pavitrāḥ; cākṣuṣāḥ; devāḥ; śuciḥ; indraḥ; bhaviṣyati; agniḥ; bāhuḥ; śuciḥ; śuddhaḥ; māgadha; ādyāḥ; tapasvinaḥ

verses.text: सत्रायणस्य तनयो बृहद्भ‍ानुस्तदा हरि: ।वितानायां महाराज क्रियातन्तून्वितायिता ॥ ३५ ॥
verses.transliteration: satrāyaṇasya tanayobṛhadbhānus tadā hariḥvitānāyāṁ mahārājakriyā-tantūn vitāyitā
verses.meaning: O King Parīkṣit, in the fourteenth manvantara the Supreme Personality of Godhead will appear from the womb of Vitānā, and His father’s name will be Satrāyaṇa. This incarnation will be celebrated as Bṛhadbhānu, and He will administer spiritual activities.
verses.wordMeanings: satrāyaṇasya; tanayaḥ; bṛhadbhānuḥ; tadā; hariḥ; vitānāyām; mahā; rāja; kriyā; tantūn; vitāyitā

verses.text: राजंश्चतुर्दशैतानि त्रिकालानुगतानि ते ।प्रोक्तान्येभिर्मित: कल्पो युगसाहस्रपर्यय: ॥ ३६ ॥
verses.transliteration: rājaṁś caturdaśaitānitri-kālānugatāni teproktāny ebhir mitaḥ kalpoyuga-sāhasra-paryayaḥ
verses.meaning: O King, I have now described to you the fourteen Manus appearing in the past, present and future. The total duration of time ruled by these Manus is one thousand yuga cycles. This is called a kalpa, or one day of Lord Brahmā.
verses.wordMeanings: rājan; caturdaśa; etāni; tri; kāla; anugatāni; te; proktāni; ebhiḥ; mitaḥ; kalpaḥ; yuga; sāhasra; paryayaḥ
